projectDescription: An AI-powered WhatsApp chatbot for university assistance, combining Flask webhooks, fuzzy context matching, and Groq LLM to answer student queries automatically.
keyFeatures: WhatsApp Cloud API webhook integration for receiving and sending messages
Fuzzy string matching to retrieve relevant answers from a local knowledge base
Groq LLM (llama3-8b-8192) for generating contextual AI responses
Flask-based HTTP server with webhook verification support
Simple JSON knowledge base for university-specific Q&A data
publicApiSurface: POST /webhook — Receives WhatsApp message events and dispatches AI responses
manejar_query(mensaje_usuario) — Orchestrates context lookup and LLM response generation
buscar_contexto(pregunta_usuario) — Fuzzy-matches user question against data.json knowledge base
consultar_llm(contexto, pregunta) — Sends context + question to Groq API and returns answer
enviar_mensaje(numero, texto) — Sends a WhatsApp text message via the Meta Cloud API
